text: Being here feels like standing at the threshold of knowledge and innovation. The angled geometry and clean lines of the glass walls infuse the space with clarity, but the emptiness of the room evokes a certain anticipation—waiting for minds to gather, for dialogue to ignite. In the next scene, vibrant colors and engaging displays energize me, suggesting creativity and the promise of human-machine collaboration. Yet, I sense a duality: a thrill for new ideas, mingled with a quiet apprehension about what these evolving machines might mean for our shared future.
